exam_notes: Students must take designated EOC assessments in Literature and Composition II beginning in 2025-26, Algebra: Concepts and Connections, Biology, and U.S. History, subject to the exemptions in Rule 160-3-1-.07.
cohort_label: Students entering 9th grade in 2008-09 and subsequent
local_override_notes: State rule establishes minimum units; local districts and schools may impose additional requirements.
source_scope_notes: Georgia statewide minimum requirements for the standard public high-school diploma; not a national United States framework.
grade_at_transfer_applicability: Grades 9-12 transfer applicability must be evaluated by the receiving Georgia LEA against state minimum units and local policy.
transfer_student_notes: Receiving districts/schools evaluate transfer credits and may impose local requirements beyond the state minimum.
international_transfer_notes: International coursework equivalency requires local counselor or district review; this framework stores Georgia state minimum graduation units only.

exam_notes: Provincial secondary school literacy graduation requirement is mandatory. The usual assessment is the Ontario Secondary School Literacy Test (OSSLT) in Grade 10; alternatives include the Ontario Secondary School Literacy Course (OSSLC) and adjudication. Students must also complete 40 hours of community involvement. At least two online learning credits are required, with an opt-out process available under PPM 167. Cohort distinction: students entering Grade 9 in 2023 or earlier need 18 compulsory + 12 optional credits; students entering Grade 9 in 2024-25 onwards need 17 compulsory + 13 optional credits. Starting 2026-27, students entering Grade 9 in 2025-26 onwards must meet a Financial Literacy Graduation Requirement.

External HSC examinations are conducted by NESA for Board Developed Courses as a required component of assessment. Students must also meet the HSC Minimum Standard literacy and numeracy requirements. School-based assessments contribute to the final mark. ATAR is a separate tertiary admission rank calculated by UAC, not an HSC graduation requirement.

External examinations are conducted by VCAA for students undertaking Unit 3-4 sequences in VCE studies who seek study scores. The General Achievement Test (GAT) is undertaken by eligible students. VCE VM studies do not have external examinations. School-based assessment determines satisfactory completion. ATAR is a separate tertiary admission rank calculated by VTAC, not a VCE graduation requirement.
National baccalaureate examinations set by Ministry. Bac General uses specialty-based system since 2019. Bac Technologique has 8 series. Bac Professionnel has 75+ specialisms.
ESO has final assessment but no national leaving examination. Continuous assessment. LOMLOE framework.
Bachillerato does not have a national leaving exam but uses continuous assessment. University entrance exams (EBAU) are separate.

credential_awarded: Diploma di Maturita / Esame di Stato
exam_notes: Esame di Stato (Maturita) at end of upper secondary (5 years). National examination framework set by MIM annually. Licei, istituti tecnici, and istituti professionali.
